chapter_title.en: The Severity of a Believer’s Afflictions

text: 28 - وعن أبي عبد الله (ع) لا يصير على المؤمن أربعون صباحاً إلاّ تعاهده الربُّ تبارك وتعالى بوجَع في جسده أو ذَهاب ماله أو مصيبة يؤجره الله عليها.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 28. It has been also narrated that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: No forty days pass for a believer without the Glorious and most High Lord presenting him with pain in his body or loss of wealth, or an affliction for which Allah rewards him.
